purpose: Registry of APPROXIMATE geographic-context layers added around the audited Petoskey Pit CivicBowl UE scene, so it can be reviewed at human/civic scale (city, bay, horizon, sunset, foreground approach). Every layer DECLARES its provenance. Context never edits or gates the audited design geometry (see scripts/unreal/context_common.py: assert_disjoint_from_design).

categories.City_LoFi: Broad, deliberately approximate downtown/waterfront context (massing, roads, parks, labels, bay edge) under Context/City_LoFi/. Lo-fi by design; draped at a single datum.
categories.Foreground_HiFi: Higher-fidelity corridor from the seating/stage NNW across the lawn/waterfront to Little Traverse Bay, on the real 3DEP terrain, under Context/Foreground_HiFi/.
categories.Backdrop: Legacy v0 bay/horizon proxies under Context/<layer>. Built-but-HIDDEN in the accepted scene (bVisible=false); kept for provenance, superseded for review by bay_edge_cartographic + fg_terrain. Do NOT un-hide.

site.name: Petoskey Pit / CivicBowl, Petoskey MI
site.latlon_provenance: EPSG:6494 local origin [19533067.7, 750799.2] ft -> EPSG:4326 via pyproj Transformer(always_xy); recorded as a constant so the solar calc needs no GIS deps
site.water_surface_elev_provenance: MEASURED via EPT viewshed analysis (scripts/build_site_context.py); elevation measured, drawn planar extent is a simplified proxy
site.outliner_root_note: Disjoint from every audited design folder root; excluded from design-count gates.
site.project_dem_note: Audited project terrain (heightfield_proposed, 801x801 @1ft) spans local N up to ~118 m; Foreground_HiFi terrain starts north of that so it never overlaps the audited bowl terrain.

redistributability_policy: Only open / derived / computed data is committed or built. No proprietary Google Earth/Maps/Street View geometry, imagery, or DEM is imported. OSM-derived layers carry ODbL attribution; 3DEP is USGS public domain. Layers marked redistributable:false are refused by the generator and verifier.

layers.source: Little Traverse Bay water surface; elevation 579.45 ft NAVD88 (EPT viewshed analysis). Planar extent is a simplified rectangle NNW of the site.
layers.accuracy_class: elevation MEASURED (+/-0.5 ft); horizontal extent APPROXIMATE (simplified rectangle, not a surveyed shoreline)
layers.notes: Flat horizontal surface at the water elevation, far below seating and the NW rim; the thing being viewed, not an occluder. HIDDEN (bVisible=false) in the accepted CivicBowl.umap; superseded for review by bay_edge_cartographic. Do not un-hide.

layers.source: Optional OSM coastline / natural=water edge at data/context/shoreline.geojson; else a straight-line proxy perpendicular to the bay-view axis at the simplified water near-edge.
layers.accuracy_class: OSM shoreline ~few m where present; else straight-line PROXY (schematic, non-surveyed)
layers.expected_input: data/context/shoreline.geojson (EPSG:4326 LineString features; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)
layers.notes: Legacy proxy, HIDDEN in the accepted scene. Superseded by bay_edge_cartographic (real OSM Lake Michigan relation edge). Do not un-hide.

layers.source: Experiential far-horizon reference band beyond the bay along the bay-view axis.
layers.accuracy_class: NON-METRIC visual reference only; not a measured landform
layers.notes: Tall thin band far NNW. HIDDEN (bVisible=false) in the accepted scene; reads as a fake floating strip. Do not un-hide.

layers.source: OSM building footprints, extruded. Generic height when no height/building:levels tag.
layers.accuracy_class: APPROXIMATE MASSING, not measured architecture; footprints OSM (~few m), heights generic (8 m) unless tagged. Bases draped at the water datum (lo-fi v0).

layers.source: OSM road centerlines, drawn as flat ribbons at the local datum.
layers.accuracy_class: APPROXIMATE centerlines; OSM (~few m), no measured width/grade
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_roads.geojson (EPSG:4326 LineString features; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: OSM leisure=park/garden/nature_reserve/common + landuse=recreation_ground/grass polygons, drawn as flat green pads at the local datum.
layers.accuracy_class: APPROXIMATE open-space polygons; OSM (~few m). Flat pad at the water datum (lo-fi v0), no real grade.
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_parks.geojson (EPSG:4326 Polygon features; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: City-wide USGS 3DEP DEM (data/context/dem/city_3dep.tif) meshed as the lo-fi city ground surface, carved around the audited design terrain and the foreground 3DEP corridor so it never overlaps them.
layers.accuracy_class: 3DEP planning-grade terrain; decimated (~12 m grid) for the city ground. NAVD88 metres == local-z directly.
layers.attribution: U.S. Geological Survey, 3D Elevation Program (3DEP), public domain
layers.expected_input: data/context/dem/city_3dep.tif (float32 NAVD88 m, EPSG:6494; fetch over the City_LoFi AOI)

layers.source: OSM place nodes (town/locality) drawn as billboard text markers for orientation.
layers.accuracy_class: Label POSITIONS OSM place nodes (~10s m); text is the OSM name tag.
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_places.geojson (EPSG:4326 Point features; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: Little Traverse Bay shoreline as a cartographic LINE: member ways of the OSM Lake Michigan natural=water relation, bbox-clipped, drawn as a thin ribbon at the water elevation. NOT a filled water slab.
layers.accuracy_class: OSM shoreline (~few m). A LINE only — the visible bay boundary that supersedes the hidden bay_water_plane slab.
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_water_edge.geojson (EPSG:4326 LineString features, role=bay_shoreline; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: Petoskey harbor breakwaters and piers as OSM man_made=breakwater/pier centrelines, redrawn as thin walls sitting on the bay water plane. The long breakwater carries the Bayfront pierhead light. The marina/harbour basin polygon is used to carve the harbor terrain to water (not meshed).
layers.accuracy_class: OSM man-made structures (~few m), centreline buffered to a nominal width; height nominal (~2 m breakwater / ~1.2 m pier above the 579.45 ft water plane).
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_harbor.geojson (EPSG:4326; breakwater/pier LineStrings + marina Polygon; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_osm_context.py)

layers.source: USGS 3DEP 1 m DEM clip over the bay-view corridor, meshed as the real foreground ground surface north of the audited project terrain.
layers.accuracy_class: 3DEP 1 m planning-grade LiDAR-derived DEM; NAVD88 metres == CivicBowl local-z directly. Decimated for the review mesh. Clipped to start north of the audited project DEM (no overlap).
layers.attribution: U.S. Geological Survey, 3D Elevation Program (3DEP), public domain
layers.expected_input: data/context/dem/foreground_3dep.tif (float32 NAVD88 m, EPSG:6494; fetch via scripts/unreal/fetch_foreground_dem.py)

layers.source: OSM pedestrian-class ways (footway/path/steps/cycleway/pedestrian/track) within the foreground AOI, draped on the 3DEP foreground terrain as thin ribbons.
layers.accuracy_class: APPROXIMATE OSM centerlines (~few m); draped on 3DEP foreground terrain (not surveyed alignments).
layers.expected_input: data/context/osm_petoskey_roads.geojson (highway in footway/path/steps/cycleway/pedestrian/track), and data/context/dem/foreground_3dep.tif for draping

layers.source: The bay shoreline within the foreground corridor (bay_shoreline ways clipped to the AOI), drawn as a ribbon at the water elevation — the near waterfront the audience looks toward.
layers.accuracy_class: OSM shoreline (~few m). Same source as bay_edge_cartographic, restricted to the foreground corridor.

layers.source: DEFERRED: cartographic edge of the landscape treatment cell, traced (read-only) from the audited material_zones/stage_floor geometry to show the seating->treatment->bay relationship.
layers.accuracy_class: Would be a read-only echo of audited geometry as a context line; not yet built pending confirmation it must not be confused with the audited design layer.

layers.source: DEFERRED: foreground tree/canopy masses from OSM natural=wood/tree_row and/or NLCD Tree Canopy Cover.
layers.accuracy_class: Approximate canopy masses; not yet fetched.

layers.source: Calculated solar position (NOAA solar-position algorithm) for Petoskey MI at named summer-evening timestamps; drives a directional light + sky.
layers.accuracy_class: COMPUTED solar position (NOAA, ~0.01 deg); apparent elevation includes Saemundsson refraction. Sky colour/intensity is atmospheric (artistic), the SUN DIRECTION is calculated.

layers.source: Camera derived from the audited seating + bay-view axis: an upper seating row looking over the stage toward the bay/horizon along azimuth 330.
layers.accuracy_class: Position from audited seating geometry (exact); aim along the audited bay-view axis. Separate from the 7 audited cameras (does not change the design camera count).
